parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sessions (source, principal, raw_summary, projects_touched, new_concepts, decisions_made, open_questions, command_or_api, git_ref, artifact_url, metadata)
VALUES ($1::text, $2::text, $3::text, $4::text[], $5::text[], $6::text[], $7::text[], $8::text, NULLIF($9::text, ''), NULLIF($10::text, ''), $11::jsonb)
RETURNING id::text AS session_id
